source.name: Lab 4.2: Modifying System Patterns (pattern_session_start)
source.instructions: Run the assessment to verify pattern_session_start in level1/data/system/patterns/patterns.yml has both utter_greet and utter_contact in steps.
source.guidance: In level1/data/system/patterns/patterns.yml add - action: utter_contact as a second step under pattern_session_start steps (after utter_greet).

sequence.feedback: pattern_session_start in patterns.yml has both utter_greet and utter_contact in steps.
